problem_solved: High cost and time required for drug target identification and molecule design
solution_description: AI platform for end-to-end drug discovery using generative AI for target identification, molecule design, and clinical trial prediction. Has internal pipeline and pharma partnerships.
notes: Leading generative AI drug discovery company. PandaOmics for target ID, Chemistry42 for molecule design. Asian HQ with global presence. Competes with BenevolentAI, Recursion.
